rules.rule_text:
title: Possible Account Compromise Email Rule
id: 2ff31c7c-a33a-4c1f-9b64-327de4298738
status: test
description: Detects scenarios where an attacker attempts to hide within a compromised
  email account, such as creating RSS subscriptions, replacing original financial
  information with the attacker's details, or avoiding certain email notifications
  during a breach.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/blog/email-forwarding-rules/
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PwC-IR/Business-Email-Compromise-Guide/main/PwC-Business_Email_Compromise-Guide.pdf
- https://expel.com/blog/seven-ways-to-spot-business-email-compromise-office-365/
author: NTT Security - Ramine Etow
date: 2024-03-25
modified: 2026-03-31
tags:
- attack.collection
- attack.t1114
- attack.t1114.003
- attack.initial_access
- attack.t1566
logsource:
  product: m365
  service: exchange
detection:
  inbox_rule:
    Operation|cased:
    - New-InboxRule
    - Set-InboxRule
  suspicious_folder:
    Parameters.MoveToFolder|contains:
    - RSS
  suspicious_keywords:
  - Parameters.BodyContainsWords:
    - dropbox
    - hacked
    - span
    - phishing
    - fraud
    - drop
    - hack
    - drop box
    - azure
    - invoice
    - Wire
    - Tax
    - Payroll
    - Password
    - Docusign
  - Parameters.SubjectContainsWords:
    - dropbox
    - hacked
    - span
    - phishing
    - fraud
    - drop
    - hack
    - drop box
    - azure
    - invoice
    - Wire
    - Tax
    - Payroll
    - Password
    - Docusign
  - Parameters.SubjectOrBodyContainsWords:
    - dropbox
    - hacked
    - span
    - phishing
    - fraud
    - drop
    - hack
    - drop box
    - azure
    - invoice
    - Wire
    - Tax
    - Payroll
    - Password
    - Docusign
  - Parameters.RecipientAddressContainsWords:
    - '@'
    - .
  condition: inbox_rule and 1 of suspicious_*
fields:
- Parameters.Name
- Parameters.MoveToFolder
- Parameters.BodyContainsWords
- Parameters.SubjectContainsWords
- Parameters.SubjectOrBodyContainsWords
- Parameters.RecipientAddressContainsWords
falsepositives:
- Correlate with other email rules user might have created in the past.
level: high
